overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's downtown district. The clip transitions from a bright sunlit street with modern architecture into a dark neon-lit urban canyon with dense cyberpunk signage and elevated infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunny downtown commercial street with crosswalk

events.description: moving from open plaza area toward street crossing with traffic island
crossing the street at marked crosswalk while vehicles pass on the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past pedestrians and crossing the street at the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: woman in black outfit walking toward camera on the sidewalk
white sedan driving along the multi-lane street

entered.detail: modern commercial building with bright yellow facade and green neon trim along the roof
large vertical digital advertisement screen displaying pink and purple graphics
futuristic high-rise building with distinctive teal glass facade and geometric architecture
curved elevated roadway structure with red and white barrier markings
large circular planter containing palm trees on the street median

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright sunlit downtown street in a futuristic city. The camera follows a pedestrian path past a distinctive yellow building with neon trim, moving toward a crosswalk. The tall teal skyscraper dominates the distant skyline while an elevated highway ramp curves on the left. The character crosses the street, passing palm trees in the median, with light pedestrian and vehicle traffic visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with dynamic neon underlighting

events.description: entering shaded area under building overhang with colorful neon strip lighting
neon lights on building facade cycle through colors from pink to blue to green

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under building overhangs, following a character in red clothing

notable_agents.action: character in red outfit walking ahead on the pedestrian path

entered.detail: building facade with dynamic multicolored LED strip lighting that cycles through rainbow colors
large white concrete planter box with dense tropical foliage

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered walkway where the lighting becomes mixed between natural sunlight and artificial neon. The camera follows a character in red clothing along a path lined with large white planters. On the right, a building features prominent dynamic neon underlighting that shifts colors. The elevated highway remains visible on the left while the distant teal skyscraper stays centered in the view ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon entrance with vertical neon signage and overhead structures

events.description: entering darker urban canyon as buildings close in and sky becomes obscured
slight turn to follow the curving street path deeper into the canyon

agents.ego_description: walking deeper into the urban canyon following the pedestrian path and passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with green mohawk and dark coat walking ahead on the path

entered.detail: dense cluster of vertical neon advertisements and holographic signage covering building facades
metal walkway structure connecting opposing buildings above street level
dark teal building with geometric window patterns and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions into a narrow urban canyon as the sky becomes mostly blocked by towering buildings. The lighting shifts to artificial sources from dense neon signage covering the building facades. An overhead pedestrian bridge spans the street ahead. The camera follows a pedestrian with a distinctive green mohawk deeper into the canyon, where the architecture becomes darker and more enclosed.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep urban canyon with dense cyberpunk neon and overhead industrial structures

events.description: approaching group of NPCs in what appears to be a potential interaction or combat zone
entering area with highest density of neon signage and holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: navigating through the dense urban canyon, weaving between pedestrians and observing the neon-lit environment

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair and white tank top walking past the camera
group of pedestrians gathered near a building entrance with neon lighting

entered.detail: multiple layered digital billboards hanging across the street at different heights
dense network of metal pipes, walkways, and industrial framework connecting building facades

segments.scene_description: The final segment descends into the deepest part of the urban canyon where natural light is completely blocked. The environment is illuminated entirely by dense neon signage and holographic advertisements covering every surface. Industrial overhead structures create a canopy of pipes and walkways above. The camera navigates through moderate pedestrian traffic, passing various NPCs, with the architecture creating an immersive cyberpunk atmosphere dominated by teal and purple neon hues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic downtown district that transforms from a bright, sunlit boulevard into a dark, neon-drenched urban canyon. It begins on a wide pedestrian path past a yellow building with neon trim, moving toward a crosswalk under a clear sky dominated by a distant teal skyscraper. As the camera enters a covered walkway, the natural light begins to blend with artificial neon underlighting and white planters before the surroundings tighten into a narrow corridor. The scene then shifts deeper into the city as towering buildings block the sky, replacing sunlight with dense neon signage and an overhead pedestrian bridge. Finally, the camera descends into the deepest part of the canyon, where natural light vanishes entirely in favor of a canopy of industrial pipes and holographic advertisements glowing in teal and purple hues.
